resources.string: Start watching a movie or show to track your progress here.
This title is not available with the current content setting.
Receive providers, IPTV, Panda, and integration credentials from a phone or desktop that already works.
Transfer encrypted credentials from a device that already works. Faster than re-entering each one by hand.
Paste the receive code from the other Torve device.
Show a one-time QR code for another Torve device to scan.
Credentials are end-to-end encrypted with a one-time key. Torve servers only forward the encrypted bundle — they can\'t read the contents.
Manual paste is the same encrypted bundle shown as text. Copy/paste between your own devices when the camera or relay aren\'t available — never share it with anyone else.
Some integrations (Plex, Jellyfin) need a server URL alongside their token. If the URL isn\'t set on the sending device, you\'ll need to fill it in manually after import.
No credential transfer has been started on this device yet.
No credentials, tokens, session strings, or envelope bytes appear on this screen.
Automatic transfer has not been checked yet. This is normal until you send or receive credentials.
Automatic transfer is reachable. QR transfer can complete without manual paste.
Automatic transfer is not available from this backend. Use the Advanced manual code paste fallback.
Sign in again to use automatic transfer. The Advanced manual code paste fallback still works.
This phone could not reach the Torve backend for automatic transfer. Use the Advanced manual code paste fallback.
Sign in to use automatic transfer. The Advanced manual code paste fallback still works.
Encrypted transfer is not available on this device. Update the app or set up credentials manually.
Review this account setting and update access if eligible
Sign in to manage your account on this device.
Torve is free software. No subscriptions. No paid tiers.
Only show cached streams for instant playback
Hide repeated movies or shows in lists
Automatically pick and play the best stream
Automatically play the next episode when current finishes
Changing the language to %1$s will restart the app. Continue?
This will remove all cached metadata. You may need to reload content.
Export your extensions, preferences, watch progress, and channel favorites to a file. API keys and tokens are never included.

Once available, you\'ll be able to create an account to sync your settings, watchlist, watch progress, and card style presets across all your devices. No action needed — this feature will be enabled automatically in a future update.
Refreshing account, devices, channels, and content in the background.
Permanently remove your Torve account and associated data

Deleting your Torve account will permanently remove your account and associated data, including saved preferences, watchlist, favorites, linked devices, and other account-related data that is no longer required.

Some limited information may be retained where necessary for security, fraud prevention, billing, dispute resolution, or legal compliance.

This action cannot be undone.
We could not complete your account deletion right now. Please try again in a moment.
This will permanently delete your Torve account and associated data. This action cannot be undone.
Extensive help and documentation is available for registered and signed-in users at torve.app, in all supported languages.
Check out Torve — a beautiful media player and content organizer! https://torve.app
Verify your email to use Torve on this device
Verify your email to keep your account secure on this device.
You have full access to all features.
This feature is available to everyone.
%1$s No purchase is required for access.
Purchase state is historical and does not affect access.
No purchase verification is required for access.
Torve cannot reach the access service right now. Refresh again shortly.
No purchase restore is required for access.
Sign in to Torve before refreshing access on this device.
Sign in to Torve before continuing on this device.
Sign in to Torve before refreshing access from %1$s on this device.
This historical purchase record is linked to a different Torve account. Sign in with the original account or contact support.
No Amazon purchase record was found for this Torve account. Access is not affected.
No purchase record was found for this Torve account on %1$s. Access is not affected.
Full access is enabled on this device.
Full access is enabled on this device.
This account has full access, but this device still needs registration.
Full access is enabled on this device.
Full access is enabled on this device.
This account has full access, but this device still needs registration.
Google Play purchase state does not affect access.
Apple purchase state does not affect access.
%1$s access refresh could not be completed. Try again after signing in.
Pairing devices is available to everyone.
Managing paired devices is available to everyone.
Device sync is available to everyone.
Continue playback is available to everyone.
Stream playback is available to everyone.
If that email exists, a reset link will be sent.
Account created! Please check your email to verify your address.
Device limit reached. Remove an existing device to continue.
Choose whether to save integrations to your Torve account or keep them only on this device.
• Torve account (recommended) — Restores this integration when you sign in on another device.\n• This device only — Keeps this integration local to this device and does not sync.
Passwords and API keys are not shown in full after saving.\nDevice-only credentials are cleared when you sign out.
Save to Torve account (sign in required)
Securely saves this integration to your Torve account and restores it on other devices.
Keeps this integration only on this device. It will not be restored on other devices.
Passwords and API keys are not shown in full after saving.
This integration is set to device-only storage. Enter credentials on this device to use it.
This integration is saved to your Torve account but credentials could not be restored on this device. Please re-authenticate.
This removes the saved integration from your Torve account and this device.
This removes the saved integration from this device.
This will remove the saved credentials from your Torve account. You may need to enter them again on this device.
This will securely save this integration to your Torve account so it can be restored on other devices.
Signing out clears local credentials stored on this device. Integrations saved to your Torve account will be restored when you sign in again.
Replay is unavailable for this programme.
Sign up with email and password
Sign in to your Torve account
Full access is enabled. This device needs registration.
Connect AI providers and API keys.
Torve is free software. No subscriptions. No paid tiers.
Full access is enabled on this device.
Full access is enabled on this device.
Full access is enabled on this device.
Full access is enabled on this device.
Full access is enabled on your account.
Full access is enabled on your account.
Full access is enabled on your account. %1$s
Full access is enabled on your account. %1$s
This device needs an available activation slot.
Add a channel source or service login to get started
Downloaded content will appear here for offline viewing.
Add movies and shows to your watchlist to keep track of what you want to watch.
Start watching something to see it here
Your watched items will appear here
No items found on your Jellyfin server
Connect your Jellyfin server in Settings → Integrations
Add TV shows to your Trakt watchlist to see new episodes here.
Link your Trakt account in Settings to see upcoming episodes from your watchlist.
Reconnect Trakt to see your calendar
Your Trakt session expired or was revoked. Reconnect Trakt in Settings to load upcoming episodes.
Showing the last saved calendar while Trakt is unavailable.
Showing saved calendar because Trakt is rate limiting requests.
Showing saved calendar because Trakt could not be reached.
Showing saved calendar because Trakt is temporarily unavailable.
Showing saved calendar because it could not be refreshed.
Connect Trakt to see your calendar
Connect external services to sync your library and progress.
Free API key for IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes, and Metacritic ratings. Get yours at omdbapi.com
Get a free key at omdbapi.com (1,000 requests/day).
OAuth device authorization and two-way sync (watchlist/history/progress).
Automatic anime and TV show tracking with device code authorization.
Connect to your Jellyfin server for library sync and continue-watching overlay.
Connect your Plex server for library badges and continue watching.
Find your token at plex.tv/claim or in Plex app settings.
Get your free API key at mdblist.com/preferences
Display ratings on movie/show detail screen
Displays weighted Torve Score in metadata row
Allow Torve Score Pill on Cards
Enable Torve Score in provider pills
Show compact rating pills on backdrop-style cards
Weights are normalized using available sources
Where to show rating pills on poster cards
How many rating pills to show on poster cards
Compact preview of inside vs outside placement
Enable sources and reorder with arrows. Higher sources show first.
Filter stream results by title. Matching streams will be excluded.
Imported %1$d regex pattern(s). %2$d disabled because the regex was blank or invalid.
Drag the handle to reorder. Tap a section to customize its poster style.
If the page shows a JSON manifest, copy its URL and try again.
Recommended guided setup for Torve streaming. Configure providers, debrid, and quality in Panda.
Popular stream extension for torrent sources. Install it optionally if you want Torrentio-based streaming.
Rich catalogs powered by TMDB - trending, popular, top rated
Access your Trakt lists, trending, popular, and anticipated titles
IMDB movie & series lists - Top 250, Most Popular, Box Office
Rating poster database - catalogs with rating overlays
Subtitles from OpenSubtitles.com - largest subtitle database
Panda is not installed yet. Install it to get guided streaming setup with server-side configuration.
Start with debrid cloud streaming or skip straight to Usenet configuration.
Use Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize, TorBox, or another supported Panda debrid service.
Skip debrid and configure Usenet, indexers, and a download client.
Select the debrid service you want to use with Panda.
Choose a provider, then connect it directly below the selected row.
%1$s does not support browser sign-in. Enter your API key instead.
Choose which torrent sources Panda should search. The defaults work well for most users.
Configure Usenet for additional streaming sources. Easynews provides the simplest setup with direct HTTP streaming.
Direct HTTP streaming with built-in search. No indexer needed.
Any Usenet provider. Requires an NZB indexer and download client.
No debrid — configure Usenet on the next steps
Select countries and categories you want to see
Start watching to see your stats
Already have an account? Sign In
Add a channel source or service login to access your channels. You can add more later in the Channels tab.
Apply a predefined style to the current preset
This will remove \"%1$s\". Sections using it will fall back to Default.
This will delete all items you\'ve finished watching.
This will delete all custom card style presets and reset rating display settings to defaults.
This will permanently delete all custom card style presets and reset all appearance settings to defaults. This cannot be undone.
The latest online version could not be loaded. Showing the bundled document instead.
The online copy and bundled fallback were both unavailable.
Organize and play your personal media library
Streaming service integration for optimized playback
Let\'s set things up in a few quick steps.

Torve is a media organizer and player. You are responsible for ensuring you have the right to access any content through third-party sources you configure. Torve does not host, provide, or control any media content.
This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
I understand and accept these terms
Connect your streaming optimization service for faster playback.
Use Panda for the easiest setup. It configures providers, debrid, and quality in one guided flow.
Keep using direct provider and API-key setup here if you want maximum manual control.
Connect Trakt to sync your watchlist, track progress, and get personalized recommendations.
You\'ll be asked to visit trakt.tv/activate and enter a code to authorize.
Set your preferred stream quality. You can change this later in Settings.
Torve is ready. You can adjust settings anytime from the Settings tab.
Try a different search term or adjust filters
Search for movies and TV shows
Equalizer not available for this audio session
No media sources installed. Add one below.
Organize and prioritize stream sources. Streams matching a group pattern are sorted together by priority (lower = higher).
Imported %1$d stream group(s). %2$d disabled because the regex was blank or invalid.
Could not import stream group JSON.
Could not export stream group JSON.
Patterns use standard regex. Use (?i) for case-insensitive. Use | to match alternatives.\nExample: (?i)(cam|ts) excludes streams containing \'cam\' or \'ts\'.\nLearn more at regex101.com
Cards grow when hovered, focused, or long-pressed
Mark movies and shows you\'ve already seen
No provider offers available in selected region.
Use search or popular terms to start
Use this screen to configure TV behavior and account integrations from a remote.
Cast works on Android TV and fails gracefully on Fire TV when Play Services are unavailable.
Language changed — restart may be needed for full effect
Manage registered devices on this account.
Choose minimum and maximum stream quality.
Control how content is presented on Home.
Voice input is not available on this device
No channels available. Add a source in Settings.
Add a channel source on your phone, then sync to TV
Import all settings from your paired phone
Pair a phone first to sync
To customize your Home tab layout, card styles, rating sources, and availability services — configure them on the Torve mobile app and tap \"Sync Settings from Phone\" above.
Pair your phone to sync all settings instantly
Pair your iPhone to sync settings
Set up everything directly on your TV
To customize Home layout, card styles, and rating sources — configure on the mobile app and tap Sync.
Customize sections on your Home tab
Restore all sections to default order and visibility
Restore default rating sources and display
Set MDBList API key above first
e.g. cozy winter movies, dark sci-fi thrillers…
Shared settings sync through your account.
No paired TVs or controller links yet.
%d active pairing linked to this account.
%d active pairings linked to this account.
Pairing is only for controller and playback handoff. Shared settings no longer depend on pairing.
Signed-in devices are managed separately from pairings and count toward your account device limit.
Pair TVs or controller devices to enable remote control and playback handoff. Shared settings sync through account sign-in.
Sign in before pairing additional devices.
Code-based pairing is not available on this server right now.
No paired devices linked to this account yet.
Your account can be active on up to %d devices at a time for security and sync integrity.
Removing a device frees a slot for another device.
Inactive devices may stop counting automatically after extended inactivity.
Remove "%s" from your account? This frees a device registration.
Your account is already active on %d devices. Remove one device to register this device.
Checking your account device registrations. Remove one active device to register this device.
To activate this device, remove one from your account.
Remove "%s"? This frees a device registration for your current device.
Start watching to see your stats
Sign in to manage your account and devices.
Size, hover zoom, watched indicators, appearance
Choose which availability services appear on your home screen. Matching titles from these services are highlighted while browsing Torve.
Configure Kodi hosts and remote control integration.
Manage pairings and signed-in devices. Shared settings sync through your account.
Send a redacted report directly to Torve support. Pasted logs are scrubbed before sending.
Send a redacted report directly to Torve support. No email or share app is required.
Create a redacted diagnostics report for support
Describe what you were doing and what went wrong.
Optional logcat, error text, or screenshots notes. Secrets are redacted.
Includes app/device/provider status, never saved credentials.
Diagnostic reports include device/app status and recent Torve logs. Secrets, tokens, passwords, stream URLs, payment data, and account credentials are redacted.
Open an email to Torve support with the report filled in.
Uploads the redacted report from this signed-in TV. No email app required.
A previous diagnostic report is saved locally. Try sending again.
Could not send report right now. Copy the report and try again later.
Use another app if no email client is installed.
Copy the redacted report to the clipboard.
Manage channel sources and persistent favorites.
2-letter country code (e.g. US, GB, DE). Determines which availability providers are shown on detail pages.
Create a local profile to send search to a TV
Some results are hidden by your content setting.
Switched to a more stable source
Create a local profile to transfer playback
This title cannot be handed off
Add a channel source to get started
Movies require a compatible channel source with service login
Series require a compatible channel source with service login
Tap the heart on any channel to add it here.
Select countries and categories you want to see
Unable to open details for this item
Notifications for new TV show episodes
Trakt, Simkl, Jellyfin, Plex, and Kodi integrations
Provider setup, diagnostics, and advanced tools
Save sources, visibility, and channel management.
Metadata providers, integrations, and diagnostics are available to everyone.
Pair devices for control/session linking and manage signed-in devices on this account.
Revoking removes access for that device. Removing clears the device record.
Devices paired for control and playback handoff with this TV/account.
Unpair disconnects control and playback handoff only. Shared settings sync through account sign-in.
Your account is already active on %d devices. Remove one device to register this device.
Checking your account device registrations. Remove one active device to register this device.
Manage your Torve account on this TV.
Send a password reset link to your email
Torve is free software. No subscriptions. No paid tiers.
Refresh account access for this device.
No purchase restore is required for access.
Current account link status from your paired phone.
Read-only status while managed by phone sync.
Connect your cloud and tracking services directly on TV.
Keys and validation for metadata services.
Media servers and external service connections.
Provider and key setup for AI-assisted search.
Install and manage optional extension sources.
Sources and feeds used by your library.
Need help with Torve? Email us at support@torve.app
Use this address for technical support, account issues, and bug reports.
Press OK to compose an email if an app is available.
No email app is available on this device.
The latest online version could not be loaded. Showing the bundled document instead.
The online copy and bundled fallback were both unavailable.
This setting controls whether sensitive catalog material can appear in eligible parts of the app for this account.
This setting stays locked until the account is eligible.
Enter the account holder’s date of birth to continue.
Confirm that you want to enable sensitive material for this account.
Program guide not configured. Open Settings > Channels to add a guide data URL.
Press OK to enable or disable. Press RIGHT to enter move mode, UP or DOWN to reorder, LEFT to finish.
Sign in to sync account devices.
Device limit reached. Remove a device to continue.
You\u2019ve reached the device swap limit. Try again later.
Could not activate this device. Please try again.
Could not load devices. Please try again.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
This feature is available to everyone.
This feature is available to everyone.
Billing is deprecated and not required for access.
Store billing is deprecated and not required for access.
Purchase state does not affect access.
This product is not available right now.
Could not connect. Please check your internet connection.
The request timed out. Please try again.
Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
Settings sync failed. Please try again.
Could not connect to the service. Please try again.
Authorization timed out. Please try again.
Authorization code expired. Please try again.
Authorization code already used. Please try again.
Invalid credentials. Please check and try again.
The service is not available right now.
Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
Could not connect. Please check your settings.
This resource is already set up.
Could not load content. Please try again.
Could not load streams. Please try again.
Could not resolve stream. Try another source.
This source is no longer available. Refresh sources or try another one.
Stream resolution timed out. Try another source.
Real-Debrid blocked this source. Try another source.
%1$s is fetching this release from Usenet. This usually takes a minute or two.
We\'ll start playback automatically as soon as it\'s ready. Leaving this screen is safe — your place is held.
Your cloud download service is still working on this. Try a different source or check back in a few minutes.
Watchlist update failed. Please try again.
Download action failed. Please try again.
Could not load channels. Please try again.
Profile action failed. Please try again.
Could not load stats. Please try again.
Add-on action failed. Please try again.
Could not install add-on. Check the URL and try again.
Could not load calendar. Please try again.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Torve uses your NzbDAV instance to stream Usenet sources. Connection is managed by the Torve backend.
Connected, but backend reported degraded status
Connection test succeeded, backend reported degraded status
Base URL and API key are required
Programme guide requires an EPG URL in your playlist
Confirm your email before setting up sources.
We sent a confirmation link to %1$s. Confirm it, then continue to setup.
Next: choose how you want to watch. Use Panda for Debrid/Usenet, add IPTV for live TV, or connect Plex/Jellyfin.
Easiest way to enable Torve\'s core source discovery — a guided wizard wires debrid + Usenet for you.
Voice input is not available on this device
You need to be signed in on this phone before you can sign in a TV.
Open Torve on your TV, go to Settings → “Sign in with your phone”. Then either scan the QR code below, or type the 6-character code shown next to it.
This phone has no camera available — use the manual code below.
Or enter the 6-character code shown on the TV
Sign in a TV with this phone
Credentials stay local while the encrypted envelope is generated.
Paste the admin-issued management token for this Panda config. It validates immediately; invalid tokens aren\'t stored.
This token lets you edit your Panda config from other devices or restore access if you uninstall. Most users don\'t need it.
Required for editing, deleting, or rotating this Panda config.
This device has no management token for this config. Paste an admin-issued token below to enable config edits.
This device does not have a Panda management token yet. Open Manage Panda → “I need a management token” to paste the admin-issued token before editing this config.
Checking connected services and ranking playback options.
%1$d fast-start options ready. Checking more in the background.
%1$d fast start • %2$d ready now • %3$d more options
Torve keeps ranked fallbacks ready if this first attempt does not start cleanly.
The quickest option did not start, so broader results are being checked.
Quick-start options stay visible while more playback choices are added.
Immediate options are surfaced first, then broader results are ranked for this device.
Torve Score blends %1$s using your selected weights.
Step 1 - Start on the device you want to set up
Open Torve on your TV/phone > Settings > Receive credentials. It will show a QR code and a receiver code.
Receiver code from the other device
Scan the QR code or paste the receiver code shown on the other device
No receiver code yet. Open Receive credentials on the device you are setting up.
Camera is blocked. Type the receiver code instead.
On your desktop or phone, open Send credentials and scan this code.
On the device that already has these set up, open Send credentials and scan this QR - or paste the receiver code below.
Asking the Torve backend to forward an encrypted bundle to this device.
When the sender posts the encrypted bundle, this device imports it automatically. Manual paste stays available below.
Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize, TorBox, and RD OAuth tokens.
Xtream and M3U playlists with their credentials.
Plex token and Jellyfin API key, plus their server URLs.
OAuth access, refresh, and client-secret tokens.
OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, DeepSeek, MDBList, and OMDB keys.
Panda token, NzbDAV credentials, and locally cached Panda provider keys.
Encrypted %1$d credential record(s) + %2$d config record(s) for: %3$s.
Tokens for %1$s are included, but their server URL is not set on this device. The receiver will need to fill it in manually.
Posting the encrypted bundle to the Torve backend so the receiver can pull it automatically.
The encrypted bundle is on the relay; the receiver will import on its next poll.
Receive codes expire so a forgotten one cannot be used later. Generate a new code to keep transferring.
Generate a new receive code first.
Receive session is no longer usable
Generate a new receive code and try again.
Ask the sender to generate a fresh sealed code.
This code was not sealed for this receive session, or it was changed.
This app cannot read transfer version %1$d.
This transfer nonce has already been consumed on this device.
The envelope and payload expiry values do not match.
Imported %1$d credential record(s) + %2$d companion config record(s).
No known credential keys were found in the payload.
Rollback succeeded; existing credentials were restored.
Credentials and setup details imported. Some providers may take a moment to reconnect.
Credentials imported. Some providers may take a moment to reconnect.
Skipped config keys not on the receiver allowlist: %1$s.
Imported credentials but missing companion config for: %1$s. Fill in the matching server URL in Settings to finish setup.
